entities.name: PLANT PROTEIN
entities.description: A sustainable source of protein derived from plants for future generations

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect, which agriculture aims to reduce

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: CLIMATE VOLATILITY
entities.description: Unpredictable changes in weather patterns affecting agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of increasing the variety of crops grown to improve sustainability

entities.name: NUTRIENT RICHNESS
entities.description: The presence of high levels of essential nutrients in a crop

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Tools and data such as genome sequences and maps used for crop improvement

entities.name: GENETIC STRUCTURE
entities.description: The organization and distribution of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: BREEDING GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material used in breeding programs to develop new varieties

entities.name: WINGED BEAN
entities.description: A high seed protein tropical legume known as the soybean for the tropics

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A crop used as a comparison for the protein potential of winged bean

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of putting together the chromosome-level sequence of the winged bean genome

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: The process of creating linked genetic maps to identify gene locations

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci analysis used to link genomic regions to specific traits

entities.name: EXPRESSION STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis of gene expression to understand trait regulation

entities.name: PLANT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The physical structure of the plant, a desirable trait for breeding

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein in the seeds, a desirable trait for breeding

entities.name: PHYTONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Health-promoting plant compounds, a desirable trait for breeding

relationships.description: Genome assembly performed for winged bean
Genetic diversity investigated in winged bean accessions
Genetic maps created for winged bean

Expression studies performed for winged bean
QTL analysis used to identify regions for architecture
QTL analysis used to identify regions for protein content
QTL analysis used to identify regions for phytonutrients
Winged bean is characterized by high seed protein
Winged bean is termed the soybean for the tropics
Diversification involves using stress tolerant crops
Resilience is needed in the face of climate volatility
Reducing emissions is linked to achieving sustainable protein supply and resilience
